snippet.title: Aag Lagay Basti Mein | Official Trailer | Fahad Mustafa & Mahira Khan | This Eid
snippet.description:
THE ALBM TRAILER HAS FINALLY ARRIVED!🍿

Witness the chaos, the comedy, and the carnage in the official trailer for Aag Lagay Basti Mein. Watch as Fahad Mustafa and Mahira Khan take you on a wild ride through a moral battlefield, where he’s fighting for the right way and she’s looking for the fast way🔥

With Tabish Hashmi and Javed Sheikh adding their signature spark to the madness, this is the trailer you can’t afford to miss!

The film releases this Eif Ul Fitr in cinemas near you!❤️

#FahadMustafa #MahiraKhan #AagLagayBastiMein #ALBM #EidulFitr2026

snippet.title: Sabudana | Web Series | Official Trailer | This Eid | Doogs Life
snippet.description:
Sabudana | Web Series | Official Trailer | This Eid | Doogs Life

A Web Series by Doogs Life
A Story. A Vision. A New Era.

This Eid, a YouTube web-series that blends comedy, thrill, and reality like never before.
Set in the heart of Karachi, Sabudana dives into the city’s raw energy, street-smart humor, and unspoken truths.
At its core is a middle-class struggling artist — chasing dreams in a city where survival comes before passion.
As opportunities turn into shortcuts and jokes turn into risks, the line between hustle and scam begins to blur.
How far can a man go to earn money?
And what does it really cost to survive in Karachi?
Real characters. Real struggles. Real Karachi.
This is not just a series — it’s the beginning of a new era of YouTube storytelling.

Coming this Eid. Only on YouTube.

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick

snippet.title: Minions & Monsters - Official Big Game Spot (2026)
snippet.description:
Watch the Big Game Spot for Minions & Monsters, a new installment in the animated film franchise distributed by Illumination. The film embarks on a new adventure within the Minions universe with all-new characters in Minions & Monsters, in theaters on July 1.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created. 

Minions & Monsters is directed by Academy Award® nominee Pierre Coffin, a director of the first three Despicable Me films and the first Minions film. Coffin has also provided the voice for the Minions since their film debut in 2010. The film is written by Brian Lynch (Minions, The Secret Life of Pets films) and Pierre Coffin and is produced by Illumination’s Academy Award® nominated founder and CEO Chris Meledandri and by Bill Ryan (executive producer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie). The executive producer is Brian Lynch.

Minions & Monsters is in theaters on July 1.

#IGN
